rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE CASSIE MAE GAINER TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Inventory And Accounting
rulings.Rulings: continued to july 24, 2017. as noted in the email sent to petitioner on 6/30 at 10:02 a.m. (using the email address on the letter attached to petitioner's filed declaration), a complete courtesy copy of the petition (with all exhibits) must be delivered to Room 202 no later than 2pm on thursday, july 6, and the supplemental declaration must be filed by that same time and date. neither task has been completed as of 7/6 at 2:30 p.m. the petition cannot be reviewed for content and notice until the complete copy is delivered to the examiner, and the matter cannot be set for hearing until the examiner has completed her review. the new deadline is wednesday, july 19 2017 at 3 p.m.
